subject: Re: Subtomogram reconstruction in Warp not working
body:
Hi Rose,

Sometimes just restarting Warp resolves this particular issue.

Best wishes,
Tom

> On 26 Sep 2023, at 21:28, RWilfong <rwilfong24@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Hi all, 
> 
> I'm working on learning the warp, m, relion pipeline and I've been following the TeamTomo walkthrough (https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/relion.html). 
> 
> I just recreated my star file for the first 5A reconstruction in Warp, but when I go to select "reconstruct sub-tomograms", it will not let me select "volumes" on the export subtomograms list. Does anyone know what the problem might be? Is it a naming convention problem, a data location problem, or a star file problem? Thank you! 
> 
> Cheers, 
> Rose
> 
> --
